rationale: The US-Iran deal continues to develop with new details on what remains to be negotiated, keeping it relevant for US residents through oil prices and geopolitical positioning, though it is now a continuation.

top_events.title: US and Iran announce 'understanding' / What still needs to be negotiated in US-Iran 'peace deal'
top_events.summary: The US-Iran deal is confirmed but details remain under negotiation; oil prices are falling and markets are up, providing tangible economic benefit to US residents — continuation of prior cycle's development.

top_events.title: China arrests US academic at conference for 'espionage activities'
top_events.summary: Another US academic detained by China continues an established pattern of US-China tensions; no qualitative escalation beyond prior baseline for American residents.

top_events.title: Trump says leader of Venezuelan Tren de Aragua gang killed in US strike
top_events.summary: Confirmation of a US strike killing a Tren de Aragua leader is a continuation of established domestic security operations — no qualitative change in daily life for US residents.
